headline: Jabil (JBL) Advances While Market Declines: Some Information for Investors
summary: Jabil (JBL) closed at $379.04 in the latest trading session, marking a +1.58% move from the prior day.

headline: Jabil’s Third Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Announcement Set
summary: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., June 03, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) today announced it will release its third quarter of fiscal year 2026 financials on Wednesday, June 17, 2026, before the market opens.
